sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110816" key="filaidh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλ-αιδήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n110816.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving modesty,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.450</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
